programme.title: Memorial May: WWII Battles 1
programme.desc: Witness the shocking speed and force of Hitler's Blitzkrieg. Vivid colorized footage brings to life the fall of Poland and France, and the Allied response to a new kind of warfare that would ignite a global fight for freedom.

programme.title: Memorial May: WWII Battles 5
programme.desc: Relive the Battle of the Bulge-Hitler's final, desperate offensive. Colorized footage captures the bitter cold, fierce fighting, and heroic stand by Allied troops that turned the tide and helped bring the war in Europe to an end.

programme.title: Memorial May: WWII Battles 6
programme.desc: Witness the final battle for Europe. Colorized footage captures the brutal street-by-street fight for Berlin, the fall of the Nazi regime, and the courage of Allied forces who fought to bring World War II to its end.

programme.title: Memorial May: Apocalypse 1
programme.desc: Trace the origins of WWII, revealing how the rise of fascism and the failure to confront Hitler's early invasions led to global conflict and ignited the most devastating war in human history.

programme.title: Memorial May: Apocalypse 2
programme.desc: Nazi Germany storms across Western Europe, delivering devastating blows to Allied forces. From the fall of France to the evacuation at Dunkirk,watch how tactical superiority and unprepared resistance led to some of the war's darkest setbacks.

programme.title: Memorial May: Apocalypse 3
programme.desc: Experience the global spread of war as Hitler launches Operation Barbarossa and Nazi forces invade the USSR. In the Pacific, Pearl Harbor thrusts the USA into conflict, jolting the balance of power and setting the stage for total war on every front.

programme.title: Memorial May: Apocalypse 4
programme.desc: As the conflict engulfs the globe, brutal fighting rages across North Africa, Eastern Europe, and the Pacific. There is a mounting toll on soldiers and civilians. Nazi atrocities escalate, while resistance movements grow in occupied territories.

programme.title: Memorial May: Apocalypse 5
programme.desc: Allies gain ground, the Axis powers begin to falter. Soviet forces push westward, the Allies liberate Rome, and D-Day marks the start of liberation of Western Europe. Hitler's grip is weakening, the noose tightens around Nazi Germany from all sides.

programme.title: Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Allies' heroics keep Hitler from advancing; the Red Army arrives in Berlin.

programme.title: Memorial May: Europe's Race to Victory
programme.desc: Relive the epic Allied push to defeat tyranny-gripping battles, bold strategy, and the brave souls who changed history. Their fight. Our freedom.

programme.title: Memorial May: The Pacific Race to Victory
programme.desc: From brutal island battles to iconic triumphs, witness the fearless fight for freedom and the valor of those who shaped victory across the Pacific.

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: A recount of the Battle of Gettysburg, when for three days in July 1863 men belonging to the Army of the Potomac and the Army of Northern Virginia fought in the Pennsylvania countryside. The battle recorded the single largest number of casualties of the Civil War, with over 40,000 of the 150,000 fighters being killed, and is regarded as a turning point in the conflict.

programme.title: World's Most Toxic Animals

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a project to restore a lakeside cabin once shared by a homeowner and her late husband, who died shortly after they bought it. She hopes for major updates, like a new roof, fresh stain, an expanded living room, and a quiet lookout.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
